summary: Completed comprehensive testing of soccer app features: cookie consent, legal pages (Impressum/Datenschutz), search functionality, team profile, and sidebar navigation. All 10 requested features tested and working correctly.

console_warnings.issue: React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be a child of <span> in the squad table
console_warnings.details: This is a React/framer-motion rendering warning in the table, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Cookie consent banner appears on home page with data-testid='cookie-consent'
Cookie consent has 'Alle akzeptieren' and 'Nur notwendige' buttons
Cookie banner disappears after accepting cookies
Footer renders with Impressum link (/impressum)
Footer renders with Datenschutz link (/datenschutz)
Footer renders with AGB link (/agb)
Impressum page renders with Austrian legal content
Impressum shows company: FlashPulse Sports Media GmbH
Impressum shows address: Sportplatzstraße 42, 1010 Wien
Datenschutz page renders with DSGVO reference
Datenschutz has table of contents (Inhaltsverzeichnis)
Datenschutz has all required sections (Verantwortlicher, Datenerfassung, Cookies, Rechte, Kontakt)
Search page loads at /search
Search input found with data-testid='search-input'
Search for 'brondby' returns Brøndby IF team result
Team Profile page loads for team 293 (Brøndby IF)
Team profile shows team name and header
Team profile shows 25 players with real names (not 'Unknown')
Team profile shows jersey numbers for players
Sidebar navigation: Live link clickable
Sidebar navigation: Fixtures link clickable
Sidebar navigation: Standings link clickable
Sidebar navigation: Search link clickable
Sidebar navigation: Profile link clickable
Backend API: GET /api/health returns healthy
Backend API: GET /api/search/teams?query=brondby returns Brøndby IF
Backend API: GET /api/search/teams?query=xyznonexistent returns empty data array (not error)
Backend API: GET /api/teams/293 returns team with 25 players with display_name
critical_code_review_comments: TeamProfile.js has a minor React hydration warning due to framer-motion animation wrapper around table rows - recommend wrapping motion.tr differently to avoid <span> nesting issue
seed_data_creation: None required - using Sportmonks API live data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All cookie consent, legal pages (Impressum/Datenschutz), search, team profile, and navigation features are working. Free Sportmonks plan only covers Danish Superliga - test with team ID 293 (Brøndby IF) or search 'brondby'/'kobenhavn'. Google AdSense ad slots are MOCKED visual placeholders.
mocked_api_note: Google AdSense ad display components are placeholder divs (MOCKED)
